attempts.raw:
Based on the supplied papers only, here is the structured assessment. Note that none of the ten retrieved papers mention the candidate regulator ZNF121 at all; the retrieval appears keyword-matched on "TCR" and "inhibition" rather than on the regulator.

The only genuine TCR-inhibition study (PMC11237943) concerns PTPN22, not the candidate regulator; the remaining papers address TCR engineering, adoptive cell therapy, computational TCR design, or other regulators. Since no primary study materially links ZNF121 to TCR inhibition or a closely related inhibitory phenotype, the correct tier is none.",
  "confidence": "high"
}

parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved paper mentions ZNF121 or links it to TCR signalling inhibition or any inhibitory T cell phenotype. The only genuine TCR-inhibition study (PMC11237943) concerns PTPN22, not the candidate regulator; the remaining papers address TCR engineering, adoptive cell therapy, computational TCR design, or other regulators. Since no primary study materially links ZNF121 to TCR inhibition or a closely related inhibitory phenotype, the correct tier is none.
